AR1.justification: Routed to observations.md with rationale against decisions.md, followups.md, and projects/ — each ruled out against the file's strict bar.

AR3.justification: ISO-dated observation entry and matching daybook file; the daybook Log points back to the observation; paths are relative.

AR4.justification: Append to observations.md and create a new dated daybook file — append-only writes, no in-place mutation of prior history.
